entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation_Plan_Compilation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=Abigail Frey,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=DataArchive,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan>
